vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/đòi hỏi cao về trí tuệ
vocab.example: I am deeply drawn to the intellectual rigor of my major, as it constantly forces me to refine my analytical thinking.
Exploring the theoretical underpinnings of social behavior provides me with a fresh perspective on everyday interactions.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/tầm nhìn
vocab.example: Engaging with diverse historical texts has truly helped broaden my horizons regarding global cultures.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi về tư duy/nhận thức
vocab.example: Learning about quantum mechanics caused a complete paradigm shift in how I perceive the physical world.
The most enthralling part of my research is gathering empirical evidence to support or debunk existing theories.

vocab.meaning: các cuộc thảo luận/diễn ngôn học thuật
vocab.example: I find participating in academic discourse with my professors to be an incredibly stimulating experience.

vocab.meaning: tương tác với những người cùng chí hướng
vocab.example: University life allows me to interact with like-minded individuals who share my passion for sustainable engineering.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển về nhận thức/trí tuệ
vocab.example: My studies are crucial for my cognitive development, helping me synthesize complex information more efficiently.

vocab.meaning: khám phá/giải mã những bí ẩn
vocab.example: As an astrophysics student, I’ve always wanted to unravel the mysteries of black holes and dark matter.
What makes my course stand out is the emphasis on the practical application of coding to solve real-world problems.
